creator: suttonj@interconnect.com.au
text:
aftp is an ftp-like shell for accessing apple2 disk images. Handy utility
for apple 2 emulator users. I attempted to contact the author about releasing 
a new version, with man page, but I cannot get a response.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/aftp.tar.gz

Please add this to the ports collection when/if you have a moment. If there
are any problems please email me. Thanks, Joel...
